meta.title: 図版生成用JSONプロンプト集
meta.purpose: レポートに使う画像・図形を、まずJSONプロンプト（自然言語プロンプト＋SVG描画仕様）として定義し、そこからSVGを生成する
meta.generation_policy: 外部画像生成に出す場合は image_prompt を使用。本レポートではCSP自己完結のため svg_spec に基づきインラインSVGを手描き生成する。

figures.role: ヒーロー概念図：第三者検証サービス群 → AIエージェント → シェア奪取

image_prompt.subject: A control-room style intelligence diagram showing four Japanese QA/third-party-verification companies' services being absorbed into a central autonomous AI agent core, which then radiates outward to capture market share.
image_prompt.composition: Left: four vertical stacks of service tiles (labelled clusters) in four distinct brand colors. Center: a glowing hexagonal AI-agent core with concentric rings. Right: an expanding share wedge / market territory being taken over. Thin connective data-flow lines from left tiles into the core.
image_prompt.style: precision blueprint, dark ink-navy background, cyan signal accents, fine 1px lines, technical instrumentation feel, subtle glow, no photorealism, flat vector
image_prompt.negative: no stock-photo people, no gradients-on-white cliché, no purple-to-blue hero gradient, no emoji

figures.role: ポジショニングマップ：垂直統合度 × AI/自動化度（バブル=事業規模）

image_prompt.subject: A 2-axis strategic positioning scatter plot placing four QA verification companies by vertical integration (x) and AI/automation intensity (y), bubble size = project volume.
image_prompt.style: instrument-panel scatter, faint grid, quadrant labels, glowing bubbles in brand colors, cyan axis emphasis on dark ground

x_axis.label: 垂直統合度（コンサル〜開発まで内包）

y_axis.label: AI・自動化の作り込み度

quadrants: AI総合プラットフォーム

points.name: ベリサーブ
points.note: 独立系・設計エージェント

figures.role: サービスカバレッジ・ヒートマップ：カテゴリ × 4社（濃度=注力度）

image_prompt.subject: A coverage heatmap matrix, rows = service categories, columns = four companies, cell intensity = investment/coverage strength in cyan.
image_prompt.style: clean data grid, cyan sequential intensity, tabular numerals, dark or light adaptive

figures.role: AIエージェント代替マップ：品質保証バリューチェーンの各レイヤーと攻略優先度

image_prompt.subject: A horizontal value-chain of QA activities (upstream consulting -> test design -> test execution -> automation -> security -> reporting/PMO) with each layer scored for AI-agent replaceability and margin, highlighting the highest-leverage attack layers.
image_prompt.style: layered horizontal bands, replaceability meter per band, cyan highlight on high-opportunity layers, blueprint aesthetic

layers.name: テスト自動化構築・保守

svg_spec.note: replaceability×labor_share が大きい『テスト設計』『テスト実行』が最大の攻略ポイント

figures.role: 各社シンボルアイコン（一貫した幾何モチーフ）

image_prompt.subject: Four minimal geometric monogram icons for QA companies, sharing a common inspection/verification motif (check, magnifier, node), each in its brand color.
image_prompt.style: flat, 1.5px stroke, 48px grid, consistent visual family
